'''3B-IR''' was a black-[[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] owned by the [[Metatheran Cartel]].

==Biography==
3B-IR served in the Personnel Office of the Cartel's [[Metatheran Cartel jungle base|jungle base]] on [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]] alongside [[Y4-E]] and [[LS-121]] during the time of [[Velin Wir]]'s plot to take over the economy of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]] in [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]]. At this point, 3B-IR had been with the Cartel for some time, and was well versed in the organization and assignments of Cartel personnel. When the [[Cularin resistance]] successfully attacked the jungle base, they captured the base's guards and other personnel and escorted them out before the base was destroyed by a [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] bombardment from above.

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: Revelation and Refutation}} {{1st}}
